name: Cherry Turnovers
recipeIngredient: 21 ounces canned cherry pie filling, drained (see Note)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 400°F. Cut each sheet of puff pastry into four squares. Place equal amounts of cherry pie filling in the center of each square. Brush the edges with water and fold in half diagonally. Seal and crimp the edges with a fork. Bake on ungreased baking sheets for 15 to 18 minutes or until puffed and golden. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine the confectioners' sugar and water; mix well. Drizzle over the warm turnovers and serve.
Notes: You can use cherry or your favorite fruit-flavored pie filling. TV air date: September 29, 1998. Downloaded 09/07/98 from  and formatted for Mastercook by K. Hudson Lipin. Converted by MCBuster.
